title: SECOND VOICE: Lluyle's Lens: New year, endless opportunities
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"OPINION -  Happy New Year, loyal readers!","html":"OPINION - Happy New Year, loyal readers!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The year is fresh and everyone gets a clean slate.","html":"The year is fresh and everyone gets a clean slate."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"I am happy to have reached the year two thousand and twenty-six. (I had to spell that out instead of being numeric about it)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This is a personal year for me, ageing thirty years young in January. It feels like I'm shifting into a different era of my life, and with that comes a decision to be more strategic about the goals I've set for myself.","html":"This is a personal year for me, ageing thirty years young in January. It feels like I'm shifting into a different era of my life, and with that comes a decision to be more strategic about the goals I've set for myself."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We all know this time of year well. It's when we plan, when we set goals, when we make New Year's resolutions. We create pre-concepts of how we want to 'see' ourselves during the year, almost like a movie playing in your head.","html":"We all know this time of year well. It's when we plan, when we set goals, when we make New Year's resolutions. We create pre-concepts of how we want to 'see' ourselves during the year, almost like a movie playing in your head."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"I have to admit, having the Cape Argus dubbing me a representative of the next generation of artists in the Western Cape did put pressure on me, especially after having received an award last year.","html":"I have to admit, having the Cape Argus dubbing me a representative of the next generation of artists in the Western Cape did put pressure on me, especially after having received an award last year."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"As 2025 came to a close, I reflected on that statement in a Facebook post on 17 December. I wrote: \"This sums up my recap of 2025. I came across this article written in Cape Argus about the Western Cape Cultural Awards where I was honoured to receive the Innovative Young Artist Award.","html":"As 2025 came to a close, I reflected on that statement in a Facebook post on 17 December. I wrote: \"This sums up my recap of 2025. I came across this article written in Cape Argus about the Western Cape Cultural Awards where I was honoured to receive the Innovative Young Artist Award."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"I am looking at how this article is pedestalling me. It's a huge compliment and it definitely puts pressure on expectations created and emerging from reading that line."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"I accept that sentence in the same way I accepted the award itself: with gratitude, humility and responsibility. If that recognition speaks to anything, it is this: I am proud to be a true representation of what the next generation of artists in the Western Cape look like: innovative, rooted and unafraid to evolve.\"","html":"\"I accept that sentence in the same way I accepted the award itself: with gratitude, humility and responsibility. If that recognition speaks to anything, it is this: I am proud to be a true representation of what the next generation of artists in the Western Cape look like: innovative, rooted and unafraid to evolve.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"I learnt that no amount of outside commentary should affect how I plan my year.","html":"I learnt that no amount of outside commentary should affect how I plan my year."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sometimes we dish up too much food at the buffet, more than one can actually digest, and that's mainly why so much food goes to waste. I am guilty of this.","html":"Sometimes we dish up too much food at the buffet, more than one can actually digest, and that's mainly why so much food goes to waste. I am guilty of this."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Like a clown, I tried to juggle too many projects at once and ended up dropping the routines (the juggling balls) I had set out for myself."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This year, I want to be more realistic about what I aim to achieve, so I don't repeat the same mistakes.","html":"This year, I want to be more realistic about what I aim to achieve, so I don't repeat the same mistakes."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"I also want to embrace failure more. I want to see failures more as lessons to learn rather than setbacks. It will leave no room for discouragement and instead becomes a source of motivation, much like the beginning of a new year itself.","html":"I also want to embrace failure more. I want to see failures more as lessons to learn rather than setbacks. It will leave no room for discouragement and instead becomes a source of motivation, much like the beginning of a new year itself."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The start of a new year always reminds all of us that it is still wide open, full of endless possibilities waiting to be claimed.","html":"The start of a new year always reminds all of us that it is still wide open, full of endless possibilities waiting to be claimed."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Disclaimer: The opinions expressed in this article are those of the author. They do not purport to reflect the opinions or views of Group Editors and its publications.","html":"Disclaimer: The opinions expressed in this article are those of the author. They do not purport to reflect the opinions or views of Group Editors and its publications."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
